mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get ready to indulge in an exclusive world of privilege and excess!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this-I stroll into Bank of Entitlement, right? I march up to the teller and demand to speak with the manager because, you know, I'm Hot Josh, the CEO! I throw a massive tantrum, screaming, "Do you know who I am? I demand a red carpet to be rolled out every time I step foot in here!" The manager comes out all flustered, apologizing profusely, and offers me a private banking suite with a personal butler on standby. And you know what? That's exactly what I deserved. So, I lounged in my luxury suite, sipping on champagne, feeling utterly pleased with myself. Ah, the perks of being Hot Josh!
